name: Cassia - 20x20 Modern Monoslope Roof Shed | Contemporary Backyard Studio, Workshop & Storage Building (PDF)
open_features: A bold single-slope roofline creates a contemporary architectural look while improving rainwater runoff and structural efficiency.
Clean lines, standard framing, and intuitive building geometry make Cassia ideal for both beginner builders and seasoned DIY enthusiasts.
A well-positioned entry door and balanced window placement provide easy access, natural daylight, and refreshing interior airflow.
Horizontal wood siding paired with sleek trim and the lean-to roofline creates a modern-rustic aesthetic with timeless curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Cassia 20x20 Monoslope Roof Shed - a spacious modern structure designed for efficiency, versatility, and clean architectural style. Highlighting a sleek single-slope roofline, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary detailing, Cassia delivers a refined exterior paired with highly practical interior space.
